experience.title: Information Technology Manager/Analyst
experience.description: Analyze the technology needs of the Graduate College, to develop short term and long term goals and to meet and implement the solutions to those needs by working with internal, external or mixed teams tech or non-tech teams.

experience.title: Manager
experience.description: Assisted with the running of the Des Moines Store (Largest in district). Managed 25 employees. Trained employees to complete their position duties. Handled cash daily and reconciled accounts.

experience.title: Web Communications Manager
experience.description: Developed and managed websites and web software related projects while staying within the $2 million budget of the Web Communications department.

extra_fields.projects: Rolled out the first company wide intranet for a Fortune 500 Company, Implemented entire electronic thesis/dissertation solution at Iowa State University
